en.title: DEX-Listed Example Vault
en.subtitle: A neutral example for post-listing actions that require ERC20 approval before the Vault write.
en.sections.allocationStatusDescription: Use the status panel for the main read state, then keep action controls in a separate operational area.
en.sections.actionDescription: Approval, simulation, write, confirmation, and refetch stay visible in one compact transaction panel.
en.states.dexListedReady: The host reports DEX-listed phase, so this listed-only action can proceed.
en.states.waitForDexListed: This action is intentionally disabled until the host reports DEX-listed phase.
en.states.connectWallet: Connect a wallet before submitting this transaction.
en.states.approvalNeeded: Approval required before the Vault write.
en.messages.approveSuccess: Approval confirmed. Submit again to write to the Vault.
en.notices.fixture: This is a public workflow fixture, not a recommendation or endorsement of any factory, token, or Vault. The manifest uses a placeholder factory; use preview URL params for local testing with a real reviewed factory.
en.notices.riskMissing: This Vault UI must integrate the current contract risk status before delivery. Read riskLevel from host Vault/TaxInfo context and display it prominently.
en.notices.previewData: Preview fixture data is shown because no real contract is connected. Pass real token and Vault addresses in the URL to test on-chain reads.
en.errors.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
en.errors.insufficientFunds: Insufficient wallet balance to complete this transaction.
en.errors.walletDisconnected: Connect a wallet before sending this transaction.
en.errors.simulationFailed: The transaction could not pass simulation.
en.errors.readFailed: Unable to refresh Vault data right now.

zh.title: DEX Listed 示例 Vault
zh.subtitle: 一个中性的上市后操作示例，用来展示 ERC20 授权后再写入 Vault 的完整流程。
zh.sections.allocationStatusDescription: 主读取状态用独立状态面板承载，交易输入和按钮保持在单独的操作区。
zh.sections.actionDescription: 授权、模拟、写入、确认和 refetch 保持在一个紧凑的交易面板中。
zh.states.dexListedReady: 宿主已报告 DEX Listed 阶段，因此这个仅上市后可用的操作可以继续。
zh.states.waitForDexListed: 这个操作会一直展示，但只有宿主报告 DEX Listed 阶段后才会启用。
zh.states.connectWallet: 提交交易前请先连接钱包。
zh.states.approvalNeeded: 写入 Vault 前需要先授权。
zh.messages.approveSuccess: 授权已确认。请再次提交以写入 Vault。
zh.notices.fixture: 这是公开模板里的工作流示例，不代表推荐或背书任何 factory、token 或 Vault。manifest 使用占位 factory；本地测试真实已审核 factory 时请通过 preview URL 参数传入。
zh.notices.riskMissing: 这个 Vault UI 必须接入当前合约风险状态后才能交付。请从 host Vault/TaxInfo context 读取 riskLevel，并在界面中显著展示。
zh.notices.previewData: 当前展示的是预览 fixture 数据，因为没有连接真实合约。需要测试链上读取时，请在 URL 中传入真实 token 和 Vault 地址。
zh.errors.amountRequired: 请输入大于 0 的数量。
zh.errors.insufficientFunds: 钱包余额不足，无法完成这笔交易。
zh.errors.walletDisconnected: 请先连接钱包后再发起交易。
zh.errors.userRejected: 你已取消这次钱包签名请求。
zh.errors.simulationFailed: 这笔交易没有通过模拟检查。
zh.errors.readFailed: 暂时无法刷新 Vault 数据。
